<var>
$DPS$ = Overcharge / (Charge-Up + Cooldown + (Overcharge / Damage * Tick))
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 7500; 2000; 6000; 9999; 27500; 50000
$FNC-PVP-COST$ = 4250; 750; 2000; 4500; 12000; 28500
$FSE-DETECTION$ = 1; 0; ;
$FSE-UPGRADE$ = Extra Juice; Second Energy Canister; Powerhouse Armor; Supercharger; Vessel Of Infinite Destruction
$FSE-UPGRADEICON$ = 11821094308; 11821094198; 11821093989; 11821093828; 11821093672
$FSE-CATEGORY$ = Hardcore
$CUREF$ = <ref name="charge">The Charge-Up happens when the '''Accelerator''' first starts attacking or its cooldown ends. This is indicated by an animation where the '''Accelerator''' charges up its plasma gun.</ref>
$CREF$ = <ref name="cooldown">The Cooldown happens when the Overcharge occurs. This is indicated by an animation where the '''Accelerator''' waves its hand.</ref>
$DREF$ = <ref name="dps">DPS is calculated as Overcharge ÷ (Charge-Up + Cooldown + [Overcharge ÷ Damage x Tick]).</ref>
</var>
<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Regular =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Tick !! Charge-Up$CUREF$ !! Cooldown$CREF$ !! Overcharge !! Range !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 12 || 0.25 || 6.5 || 2.5 || 9,000 || 19 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 15 || 0.25 || 6.5 || 2.5 || 11,250 || 19 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 25 || 0.25 || 5.5 || 2.5 || 18,750 || 21 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 40 || 0.25 || 4 || 1 || 30,000 || 21 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 50 || 0.175 || 2.5 || 1 || 50,000 || 22.5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 60 || 0.125 || 1.5 || 1 || 100,000 || 24 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
|-|PVP =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Tick !! Charge-Up$CUREF$ !! Cooldown$CREF$ !! Overcharge !! Range !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 0.2 || 2.5 || 2 || 300 || 18 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 13 || 0.2 || 2.5 || 2 || 300 || 18 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 13 || 0.2 || 2.5 || 2 || 600 || 18 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 30 || 0.15 || 2.5 || 2 || 600 || 20 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 28 || 0.1 || 1.5 || 2 || 1,280 || 20 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 72 || 0.1 || 1.5 || 2 || 2,400 || 23 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
</tabber></div>
